sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmap, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3, 4])), (2, bitmapBuild([2, 3, 4, 5])), (3, bitmapBuild([]));
SELECT id, bitmapCardinality(bitmap_col) AS cardinality FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING cardinality > 0;
SELECT id, bitmapCardinality(bitmap_col) AS cardinality FROM test_table WHERE bitmapCardinality(bitmap_col) = 0;
SELECT id, bitmapCardinality(bitmap_col) AS cardinality FROM (SELECT id, bitmapBuild(arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4, 5])) AS bitmap_col FROM test_table) WHERE cardinality > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (bitmap_data Array(UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES ([1, 2, 3]), ([3, 4, 5]), ([NULL]), (NULL);
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapBuild(arrayJoin(arrayConcat(bitmap_data, [6, 7, 8])))) AS res FROM test_bitmap;
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapBuild([max(id), min(id)])) AS cardinality FROM test_table;
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapBuild([ZEROIFNULL(NULL), 10, 20])) WHERE bitmapCardinality(bitmapBuild([1, 2])) > 1;
CREATE TABLE temp_bitmap AS SELECT id, bitmapBuild(arrayJoin([id, id + 1])) AS bitmap_col FROM test_table;
SELECT id, bitmapCardinality(bitmap_col) AS cardinality FROM temp_bitmap WHERE cardinality IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id;
INSERT INTO temp_bitmap VALUES (4, bitmapBuild([]));
SELECT id, bitmapCardinality(bitmap_col) AS cardinality, arrayJoin([1, 2, 3]) + id AS new_id FROM temp_bitmap;
SELECT id, bitmapCardinality(bitmapBuild(arrayFilter(x -> x > 0, bitmap_col))) AS cardinality FROM test_table;
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmapBuild(arrayMap(x -> toUInt32(x + 10), arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, NULL])))) AS transformed_cardinality;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_bitmap;
CREATE TABLE edge_cases (val String, bitmap_data Array(UInt32));
INSERT INTO edge_cases VALUES ('', [1, 2]), (NULL, [NULL]), ('boundary', []);
SELECT COUNT(*), bitmapCardinality(bitmap_data) FROM edge_cases GROUP BY val HAVING bitmapCardinality(bitmap_data) < 2;
